🍳

晚餐 recipes

Korean Medium medium

韓式石鍋拌飯

Korean Bibimbap

💰
Budget
$100
⏱️
Time
25 min
👥
Serves
2 people
📊
Difficulty
medium
gluten-free

Korean mixed rice bowl with vegetables and gochujang

🥗 Ingredients 材料

  • 1 2 cups short-grain rice
  • 2 200g beef bulgogi
  • 3 1 cup spinach
  • 4 1 carrot, julienned
  • 5 1 zucchini, julienned
  • 6 4 cups dashi stock
  • 7 3 tbsp gochujang
  • 8 1 tbsp sesame oil
  • 9 2 fried eggs

👨‍🍳 Steps 步驟

  1. 1 Cook rice and keep warm.
  2. 2 Blanch spinach, squeeze dry, season with sesame oil.
  3. 3 Sauté carrot and zucchini separately until tender.
  4. 4 Cook beef bulgogi in a pan until done.
  5. 5 Place rice in bowls, arrange vegetables and meat on top.
  6. 6 Add fried egg and gochujang on the side.
  7. 7 Mix well before eating.

💡 Tips 提示

For a lighter version, use cauliflower rice instead of regular rice.
